system.title: How will you use Olune?
system.subtitle: Pick the setup that fits you — you can always adjust later.

studioOwner.title: I run a dance studio
studioOwner.desc: Manage classes, families, billing, and your studio website.

instructor.desc: Work across studios, track your schedule, and manage your teaching profile.

account.title: Start your studio

account.instructorSubtitle: Your personal workspace for teaching across studios.

confirmEmail.title: Check your inbox
confirmEmail.body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it, then come back — we'll pick up right where you left off.

studio.title: Name your studio
studio.subtitle: This is what your dancers and whānau will see.
studio.invalid: Use 3+ lowercase letters, numbers or hyphens

profile.title: Your public name
profile.subtitle: How studios and students will know you.

brand.title: Make it yours
brand.subtitle: Pick a brand colour — you can refine everything later.

done.title: Welcome, {studioName}
done.subtitle: Your studio is live. Let's get you set up…
